name: Route 19 Shrimp Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Baking potatoes, peeled and coarsely chopped (4 cups)
1 lb Grouper or Amberjack fillet cut into bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein shrimp; set aside.
2. Melt butter in a large Dutch oven over low heat.
3. Add flour and curry powder to the melted butter, stirring until smooth.
4. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Gradually add chicken broth, stirring until smooth.
6. Add clam juice, half-and-half, and potato; stir well.
7. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 20 minutes or until the potato is tender.
8. Add shrimp and fish to the soup mixture; cook for 5 to 6 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink.
9. Serve immediately.
